items.title: L'Oréal accelerates generative AI content engine with fresh OpenAI deal
items.summary: L'Oréal CMO Asmita Dubey is tasked with keeping the beauty giant competitive in the age of zero-click AI search; new deal with OpenAI for generative AI content engine.

items.title: Is Saks safe for brands again?
items.summary: Saks Global received court approval for its post-bankruptcy restructuring, which could make it safer for beauty and fashion brands to wholesale there again.

items.title: L'Oréal × OpenAI: 美妆巨头加速生成式AI内容战略
items.summary: L'Oréal与OpenAI签署新协议，加速生成式AI内容引擎；CMO Asmita Dubey主导，应对零点击AI搜索时代，为美妆品牌内容营销策略带来颠覆性变化。北美市场美妆AI营销进入新阶段。

items.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026: 美妆品牌参与价值分析
items.summary: Amazon Prime Day即将来临，美妆品牌评估参与价值：促销折扣vs品牌定位损耗；北美美妆电商大促节点布局关键，Korean beauty（韩妆）和平价功效护肤在Prime Day表现突出。

items.title: Korean Beauty主导Amazon北美美妆榜单：medicube & BIODANCE双双入围
items.summary: Amazon北美美妆畅销榜：韩国护肤品牌medicube Toner Pads（#2）和BIODANCE Bio-Collagen Mask（#7）入榜；K-Beauty持续渗透北美市场，多重质地、功效型成分（AHA/BHA/胶原蛋白）是核心卖点。

items.title: 水胶体痘痘贴爆款：Mighty Patch高居Amazon北美美妆Top4
items.summary: Hero Cosmetics Mighty Patch Original在Amazon北美美妆榜排名第4，评论数高达184,140条，评分4.6★，售价$12.99/36片；水胶体痘痘贴品类持续爆发，TikTok病毒式传播驱动。FDA按OTC治疗性医疗器械监管，合规要点需关注。

items.title: 平价功效护肤The Ordinary保持北美高人气：AHA去角质爆品
items.summary: The Ordinary Glycolic Acid 7% Exfoliating Toner在Amazon排名第5，评分4.7★，54,275条评论，售价$13.50；平价功效护肤（The Inkey List / CeraVe / The Ordinary）依然是北美Z世代主流。
